data.title: Blue Moon Announces Follow on Investment of C$4.8M from Hartree
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. (TSXV: MOON) (NASDAQ: BMM) based in Toronto made an announcement on April 22, 2026, regarding their partnership with Hartree Partners LP. The partnership was established through an investor rights agreement signed on March 7, 2025, known as the Hartree IRA. This agreement signifies a strategic alliance for the company, highlighting the importance of the collaboration.

data.title: Poetry Inn Begins a New Chapter as Sttupa Estate Napa Valley
data.description: Located in Yountville, California, the Poetry Inn has been rebranded as Sttupa Estate Napa Valley. The luxury boutique hotel is embracing this new name to reflect its dedication to providing a bespoke experience for guests, as it has done for over 20 years. The concept of a stupa, symbolizing a space that enhances the connection between humans and nature, is at the core of Sttupa Estate's values of exclusivity, tranquility, and genuineness. The transformation represents a continuation of the property's commitment to offering a unique and meaningful stay for visitors.

data.title: NY Attorney General accuses Coinbase & Gemini of illegal gambling for launching prediction markets.
data.description: The Attorney General identified that cryptocurrency industry leaders were unlawfully operating betting platforms within the state, following their venture into prediction markets, which currently have minimal regulations in place.

data.title: Four IEQ Capital Founders Recognized by Forbes as Top Ten Wealth Advisors in Northern California
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Francisco, IEQ Capital, a reputable wealth management firm and multi-family office, revealed that its founders and advisors, Robert Skinner, Alan Zafran, Eric Harrison, and Jeff Westsmith, were recognized by Forbes as part of the Best-in-State Wealth list. Forbes showcases the top professionals in the industry, highlighting their expertise and excellence in managing wealth. This recognition further solidifies the standing of IEQ Capital in the industry.

data.title: Ellucian Announces 2026 Impact Award Winners, Honoring Institutions Leading with Data, SaaS, and Student-First Innovation
data.description: Ellucian honored four institutions for their creative utilization of the company's technology solutions to enhance student outcomes and operational efficiency. The recipients showcased tangible results by embracing SaaS transformation, utilizing data-driven strategies, and prioritizing student-centric approaches.

data.title: Eric Trump Moves To Expand American Bitcoin's Hashrate With New Miner Activation
data.description: American Bitcoin Corp., co-founded by Eric Trump, experienced a remarkable 10% surge in shares on Wednesday as a result of expanding its mining operations and capitalizing on the overall rise in Bitcoin prices. The company disclosed the activation of 11,298 new mining machines at its Drumheller facility, boosting its computing power by 3.05 exahashes per second (EH/s) with an efficiency of approximately 13.5 joules per terahash (J/TH). This expansion solidified their position in the market and drove the positive momentum in their stock value.

data.title: Bahamas Grid Company Appoints Two New Board Directors
data.description: In Nassau, The Bahamas, on April 22, 2026, Bahamas Grid Company (BGC) disclosed the addition of Nikolai Sawyer and Debra Symonette to its Board of Directors, starting from April 20, 2026. This move comes after the company's shift to complete independence.

data.title: Liner Hanger System Market to Reach USD 6,268.42 Million by 2032, Driven by Deepwater Exploration and Unconventional Drilling Growth | Credence Research
data.description: A recent report by Credence Research unveiled details on the Liner Hanger System Market under the title "Liner Hanger System Market Size, Share, Growth, Opportunities, and Competitive Analysis, 2025–2032." The market was valued at USD 4,084.5 million in 2024 according to the study.

data.title: NSSF Commends Indiana Gov. Mike Braun for Protecting Firearm Retailers, Ranges from Zoning Discrimination
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Washington, the NSSF®, a leading firearm industry trade association, praised Indiana Gov. Mike Braun for enacting a law that prohibits local governments from misusing zoning regulations to obstruct the operation of firearm retailers and ranges in approved zones. This action aims to safeguard the rights of these establishments in areas where they are permitted to operate, ensuring their continued presence in the community.

data.title: FHFA Director and HUD Secretary Jointly Announce VantageScore 4.0 Implementation for Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac and FHA
data.description: In a major development for the U.S. mortgage industry, the Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) and the Federal Housing Administration (FHA) have revealed the full adoption of the VantageScore 4.0 credit score throughout the government-sponsored mortgage sector. This move follows FHFA’s approval in July 2025 of VantageScore 4.0 for application in Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac mortgages. The recent announcements affirm that the implementation of this credit scoring model has been successfully executed at Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, marking a significant step forward with important implications for the U.S. housing finance system.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Cook & Boardman Group/
data.description: Cook & Boardman Group has recently acquired Exclusive Trim in a deal announced on April 22, 2026. The acquisition brings significant changes to the company. For more information, read the corrected release provided by Cook & Boardman Group through PR Newswire.

data.title: Aardvark Therapeutics (AARD) Faces Investor Scrutiny Amid 56% Drop On Clinical Pause For Lead Drug Candidate- Hagens Berman
data.description: In San Francisco on April 22, 2026, it was reported that on March 2, 2026, shareholders of Aardvark Therapeutics (NASDAQ: AARD) experienced a significant drop in share value, with shares plummeting by $7.02 (-56%). This decline occurred following the company's decision to halt its Phase 3 Hunger Elimination of Reduction Objective ("HERO") trial assessment...

data.title: London authorities, led by UK's Financial Conduct Authority, crack down on crypto traders in raid finding zero legally registered P2P traders.
data.description: A recent multi-agency operation in the UK signals a change in approach from warnings to active enforcement, as the country's regulator discovers that there are no legally registered peer-to-peer (P2P) crypto traders. This development highlights the increasing focus on regulation and compliance in the crypto market. The operation involved multiple agencies and comes as a response to the growing concerns around illegal activities and lack of oversight in the industry. The findings underscore the need for stricter enforcement measures in the crypto sector.

data.title: The Vita Coco Company Releases 2025 Impact Report
data.description: Entitled “Building Stronger Foundations for Growth,” the report highlights the public benefit corporation's dedication to creating a positive influence while expanding. It emphasizes the company's commitment to generating social impact and sustainable growth for the community.

data.title: Ex-employee sues MrBeast's company over harassment and discrimination alleging sexual harassment and pregnancy discrimination; Beast Industries denies claims.
data.description: In a federal lawsuit, a former employee of a production company owned by a prominent YouTube star alleges experiencing sexual harassment and pregnancy discrimination. The plaintiff maintains that Beast Industries, the production company in question, is responsible for the inappropriate behavior. However, Beast Industries has refuted all allegations made against them.

data.title: Tesla's Unsold EVs Pile Up, Fastest-Growing Business Shrinks 40% — Elon Musk Must Explain Tonight
data.description: After the U.S. stock market closes, Elon Musk will host a conference call regarding Tesla's (NASDAQ: TSLA) first-quarter financial results. A significant number of unresolved questions precede this call, resembling the considerable number of Tesla vehicles accumulating in lots. Tesla produced 408,386 vehicles and delivered 358,023 in the first quarter of 2026, with a notable gap of 50,363 unsold cars, reported in their SEC filing from early April. This surplus, as highlighted by InsideEVs, is the largest inventory of unsold vehicles in Tesla's history, spanning approximately two decades. This change from past practices of waitlists to excess finished electric vehicles may lead to discounts, potentially impacting profits. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
